benefits.description: Notable recovery improvements on secretagogues, further improved with HGH over 2-4 weeks
Sleep improvements on secretagogues, further improved with HGH
Vascularity and leaniness improvements on secretagogues, 50-75% better with HGH
Skin improvement noticed with HGH, not observed on secretagogues

protocol_notes: Used secretagogues for 2 years before switching to generic growth hormone. On comprehensive health protocol including other compounds. Emphasizes importance of routine bloodwork and proper diet/training. Age 46. Indicates staying below 6 IU daily for long-term safety based on research and peer discussion.
